has a voice.
I speak all of them.

I'm a full stack marketer with an emphasis on social media — strategy, photography, video, design, and the production muscle to ship all of it myself. Over the last few years I've built content for cannabis, apparel, retail, fitness, and athlete brands, each with a completely different look and audience. Flagship · Cannabis

Raw Garden

  • RoleCreative Marketing Lead
  • Tenure2024 – 2025 full time · Now retained
  • ScopeStrategy · Photo · Video · Social · Design

Creative and social lead for one of California's largest cannabis brands — owning strategy and content production for all social channels, four major product launches (including the Sprout), and a full company rebrand. I also designed the retail packaging for the "Sauce" cartridge line — physical product sold at dispensaries across California, not just a social asset. All in a heavily regulated industry with no paid ads to lean on: the strategy turned the account's multi-year follower decline into growth and produced the highest-performing posts in brand history.

Beyond the camera: a seven-pillar content system across a three-account ecosystem, the Wildlife Experts creator-ambassador program built to route around cannabis algorithm restrictions (top ambassador reel: 3.3M views), and quarterly analytics reporting with competitive benchmarking against industry engagement standards.

Everything below — product, lifestyle, farm documentation, and campaign design — was shot, edited, and designed by me. Raw Garden remains a creative services client today.

8.28%Post engagement — doubled from 4.5%, now 2.4× the industry benchmark
4.06MProfile views YTD 2025 — up 404% year over year
257KViews — highest-viewed post in brand history
122KFollowers — multi-year decline reversed to growth

Retail packaging design. The Sauce ceramic cartridge box — art direction and design for a product sold on dispensary shelves across California. Physical product design, not a social graphic.

Apparel · Santa Barbara

Lovebug

  • RolePhotographer / Creative
  • ScopeCampaigns + full e-comm catalog
  • StoreEvery product on lovebugca.com

Two drops, two opposite moods, one brand. "After Hours" — a moody blue-hour hedge-maze set built around a lavender hoodie — against "Coastal Camo", warm sunlit lifestyle work for embroidered trucker caps. The contrast is the point: same lens, two completely different worlds.

Beyond campaigns, I shoot the brand's entire e-commerce catalog — studio product photography, cutouts, and retouching for every item on the store. And the content pulls beyond its weight class: the Purple Trip Hoodie launch post drew 326 likes and 60 shares on a 340-follower account — engagement rivaling the brand's entire audience, reached almost entirely through shares and discovery.

Skate · Apparel

Cold Call

  • RolePhoto · Design · Event coverage
  • ScopeProduct drops + event content
  • Reach15K views · 671 likes on premiere edit

Ongoing content for a Santa Barbara skate brand across two fronts. Product: campaign and lifestyle photography for tee drops like the Actycopter release, shot live on site. Events: full coverage of the "Ghosted" video premiere — a Cold Call × Lighthouse Skateshop party — including a custom xerox-textured event poster and the skate edit that pulled 15K views and 671 likes on the brand's 3.3K-follower account.

Fitness · Brand identity

SETS Training Studio

  • RoleBrand identity · Photo · Social
  • BuiltLogo, colors, template system
  • Top post268 likes · welcome film 205

The one where I built the brand from scratch. Logo, brand colors, and the full visual identity for a Victorville training studio — then the photography, the monthly "Fresh Programming" campaign graphics, and a social template system the studio's own team runs long after each shoot. Ground-up brand design through day-to-day content, all in one house style.

The content carries the small account well past its size: the competition-stage post pulled 268 likes and the studio welcome film 205, on an account of ~1,340 followers.

Athlete · Paid social

Chaz Bowker

  • RoleDirector / Shooter / Editor
  • BrandsDraftKings · Dove · On
  • Platform@chazonehunit · 175K · Verified

Ad production for golf personality Chaz Bowker — concepting, shooting, and editing vertical spots for national brands including DraftKings (story ads + a World Cup reel), Dove, and On nicotine pouches. Every spot delivered as an FTC-compliant paid partnership — disclosure tags, mandated warning cards, the works — running live on his verified 175K-follower account and the Chazzy Golf YouTube series. Personality-first creative built to perform in-feed.

About

I'm Gavin — 27, based in Santa Barbara, and I've spent the last seven years in creative marketing on both sides of the table: in-house as Creative Marketing Lead at Raw Garden, and independently through Mind Garden, my branding studio, and Savor, a retail delivery brand I co-founded and grew from zero through social alone. Building brands in the cannabis space taught me to grow audiences the hard way — strict ad restrictions mean organic content, community, and creative that earns attention on its own.

Off the clock I digitize Hi8 and MiniDV tape on vintage camcorders and FireWire-era Macs — an analog habit that keeps my eye honest — and chase snow whenever the season allows.

Now: looking to bring that full-stack range in-house to a marketing, social media, or content production team in the Santa Barbara area.

  • 2025 – Now

    Freelance Creative — Photo, Video, Social & Brand

    Retained by Raw Garden for creative services; content and campaigns for Lovebug, Cold Call, Cortex, and Chaz Bowker; full brand identity (logo through system) for SETS Training Studio.

  • 2024 – 2025

    Raw Garden — Creative Marketing Lead

    Social strategy, all content production, and analytics. Doubled IG engagement (4.5%→8%+) and held it at 2.4× the industry benchmark, reversed a multi-year follower decline, led four launches, oversaw full rebrand.

  • 2023 – Now

    Mind Garden — Creative Branding Studio

    Brand development, social strategy, and print/design for startups and small brands.

  • 2022 – 2024

    Hashy — Brand Development Specialist

    Short-form video and growth strategy for a cannabis software/hardware startup.

  • 2019 – 2023

    Savor — Co-Founder

    Built a premium retail delivery brand from scratch through social, community, and influencer work.

  • 2019

    Santa Barbara City College

    AA, Business Administration & Marketing — entrepreneurship, social media marketing, graphic design.
